documented_clock_offset_measurement.protocol_relationship: similar to the Network Time Protocol
documented_clock_offset_measurement.measurement_selection: offset whose associated RTT value was minimal

documented_limitations.correctness_condition: incoming and outgoing routes have symmetrical nominal delay
documented_limitations.asymmetry_bias: half the difference between the forward and backward travel times
documented_limitations.library_mapping_policy: does not perform any particular such mapping

does_not_prove: numeric precision, rounding, overflow, finite-value, or timestamp-domain policy
packet bytes, framing, endpoint roles, socket exchange, retry, scheduling, or timing behavior
clock-filter implementation, offset history, correction mapping, smoothing, or dejitter
currentness, freshness, accuracy, reachability, interoperability, or runtime activation
device behavior, dependency acceptability, or Manifold authority
